feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Please can someone explain how to unflag for deletion a reference operation set. (cp 431)
New GL account does not reflect when adding new item in PR
entry.content:
Dear MM experts, 

Would like to seek your expertise on below test scenario with dummy data to represent the issue:

(1) Material A is tagged to valuation class 0001, GL 10000000.

(2) PR and subsequently PO was raised with material A and the PR/PO has reflected accordingly with GL 10000000.

(3) Noticed the GL tagged is incorrect. Thus, changed the valuation class for Material A to 0002 (GL 20000000).

(4) In the PR, a new line item was added after the changes. However, the GL for the new line item remained 10000000

(5) When a new PR was raise, the GL reflected correctly as 20000000.

Would like to understand the system behavior as previously if there is account determination error, we will correct the valuation class and retrigger change in PO to reflect new GL but in this case there was no account determination error but merely changes of VC to reflect another GL account. Will system not allow the same material input with different GL account in the PR?

entry.title: How to deploy Custom UI5 application onto SAP S4 HANA Cloud Public edition?
entry.content:
Hi community,
I have a scenario for creating a custom application and deploying it as a tile on the S4 HANA Cloud Public edition's FLP.

Using eclipse ADT, I have connected my dev system of HANA Public Cloud, and created a Custom Package under the Super package ZCUSTOM_DEVELPOMENT (so that the development objects can be moved to T and P systems).

My custom package holds the following objects:

  1. Custom database tables
  2. Custom ABAP Classes to handle the logic on the tables
  3. The IAM application / Business Configurations (based on few tables) to maintain data from the user side
  4. Custom root view entities on top of the ABAP classes
  5. The  service bindings and service definitions of the custom root view entities (their respective authorization objects).
  6. Custom Business catalog to store the IAM applications which are published to the HANA Cloud.

Process: (Backend)

  1. Created custom Z* Package to store the custom build objects.
  2. Created database tables to store the data.
  3. For a few tables, the business configuration objects are created to expose those tables on the HANA Cloud to maintain data.
  4. Created custom ABAP classes to handle the logic on the data in the custom tables.
  5. Created custom root entities and implemented the if_rap_query_provides~select method to handle the HTTPS calls when the root entities are exposed as an API. (Ref: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-a4c-create-custom-entity.html)
  6. Created a service definition for the custom root entity.
  7. Created service binding on top of the service definition to expose them as an OData V4 API.

Process: (Frontend)

  1. Create BTP destination do SAMLAssertion authentication type to connect the HANA cloud system. (Ref: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/31876c06f99645f289d802f9c95fb62b.html?locale=en-US)
  2. Created a custom UI application using the template.
  3. Consume the exposed Odata V4 services in the application by providing the endpoints in manifest.json file, configure the BTP destination in UI5.yaml and xs-app.json file to connect the application to backend system.
  4. The application loads successfully and in the preview mode and the data flows in preview mode.
  5. Build the mta.yaml file to generate the .mtar file.
  6. Deploy the .mtar file to deploy the application to BTP.
  7. On successful deployment, the application is available under HTML5 Applications in BTP.

After performing all these step, how can we add this developed custom application as a FIORI tile onto the S4 HANA Public cloud FLP under a custom catalog, Custom role, custom space and page?

Tried Scenario:

  1. Create a custom tile using the application Custom Tiles on HANA Cloud Public edition FLP.
  2. Provided the deployed application URL in the details of the custom tile.
  3. During assigning the catalog, The custom catalog in which the IAM applications are added is not visible in the list of catalogs to assign. Rather it shows all the SAP Standard business catalogs

How to add this custom tile to the custom business catalog created using ADT on eclipse?

Regards,
Shyam Prasad.

entry.title: app/router preview looking for a deleted project's path instead of it's own
entry.content:
Hello,

As a newbie at UI5 development, I am following the tutorial: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-create-ui.html

 

I decide to delete the original app MyHANAApp and instead created another App MyHANAApp2.

When I try to preview the ports, they do not work.

On previewing app/router, I got the below error:

#2.0#2024 12 02 18:00:02:348#+00:00#INFO#/Configuration#####m47c58h8##########m47c58h8#PLAIN##Replacing $XSAPPNAME will not take place - 'xsappname' property not found in UAA configuration.#

However, my package.json has the package name as MyHANApp2 and my mta.yaml also has the same name everywhere. On previewing Port 5000 from within MyHANAApp2, it gives the below error:

Error: ENOENT: no such file or directory, open '/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/@sap/cds/app/index.css'
    at Object.readFileSync (node:fs:457:20)
    at get html [as html] (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/@sap/cds/app/index.js:10:16)
    at /home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/@sap/cds/server.js:85:39
    at Layer.handle [as handle_request] (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/layer.js:95:5)
    at next (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/route.js:149:13)
    at Route.dispatch (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/route.js:119:3)
    at Layer.handle [as handle_request] (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/layer.js:95:5)
    at /home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:284:15
    at Function.process_params (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:346:12)
    at next (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:280:10)

 

It looks for MyHANAApp which I have already deleted. 

Also I connected the app with the new HANA Cloud Instance MyHANAApp2-Dev, and deleted the previous HDI Container, However, on going to the Database Explorer tab and refreshing , it does not show the container, but on navigating directly from My HANA Projects or searching manually within the Database Explorer using the + icon, I am able to load the DB Container. Although I think this is irrelevant, but thought of mentioning still

 

I do not want to create a new project with the exact same name as the tutorial, so that I can understand how the various components are interlinked, by resolving this error.

 

It is possible, that I might be a little vague in describing the problem, please let me know if I missed out anything, or should explain anything else in more detail.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Fiori and ADFS did only work with a refresh F5 button in the Browser
entry.content:
we are using a public URL to Access the Fiori that is behind a Load Balancer and Webdisptacher (provided from SAP RISE). This is only the Problem on the sandbox and Quality System. Production works directly without refresh.

Is there any Parameter that can be optimized ?

entry.title: Multiple input parameter is not working for DOES NOT CONTAINS operator in Define conditions
entry.content:
In define conditions multiple input parameters are working for Contains Operators but not working for DOES NOT CONTAINS operator. 

In Consumption CDS view we have defined the valuehelp

@ui.lineItem: [{ position : 2 , label: 'Notification'},
{type: #FOR_INTENT_BASED_NAVIGATION, semanticObjectAction: 'change'}]
@Consumption.semanticObject:'PRID_ISSUE'
@EndUserText.label: 'Notification'
@ui.selectionField:[{position:2}]
@ui.identification: [{position: 2, importance: #HIGH }]
@Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{entity:{element:'qmnum',
name:'Z_notification_VH'} }]
@search.defaultSearchElement: true
@search.fuzzinessThreshold: 0.7
@search.ranking : #HIGH
key qmnum

 

In ODATA we have added the logic to filter dynamically. 

 lo_facade      ?= me->/iwbep/if_mgw_conv_srv_runtime~get_dp_facade( ).

In IT_FILTER_SELECT_OPTIONS values are not storing in internal table when we search for multiple values.

Can anyone help me to solve the issue as soon as possible.

Thanks and Regards,

Sushma

entry.title: Disabling the Item Selection Check-boxes of List Output of V4 UI Generated using RAP Fiori Elements
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

As mentioned over the subject line we have a V4 UI List Application generated using the "RAP Business Generation Services" wizard option we have in ADT on top of a Table.

We have created a Custom Action ( Button ) for implementing some Custom Functionality on top of the records fetched. 

The Action we have defined is of Static type with Parameters, reason being we need action to be executed on top of the records getting fetched based on a Pop-up we have implemented for this button(STATIC ACTION with PARAMETERS based on another ABSTRACT CDS Entity) and not based on the Instance of the record selected.

Everything works fine, my question is since in the above scenario its very evident that the action is not dependent upon the Instance of the record(s) selected, is there any way to disable the below highlighted checkboxes. Is there any other way to implement a Action which is not dependent upon the Instance and we can define independently. We tried for the options to remove it from the UI5 Extension side but no luck. Helpful comments much appreciated.

Thanks,

Sijin

entry.title: Passing Values to standard semantic Objects in Intent based navigation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am facing the challenge of navigating from an analytical Query to a standard fiori app. Currently i am trying to archieve this with intent based navigation. I am using a target mapping to the fiori app and all Filters/Parameters should be automatically transferred as far as i understand it. This works but only for the fields that are exactly the same in both views/applications. The problem occurs with the ledger Fiscal year in my analytical query. I need the parameter value for this field to be transferred on the semantic Object FiscalYear. Does anybody know how i can achieve this?

Best Regards,
Dominik

entry.title: Fiori Analytical Card chart content does not display
entry.content:
I'm struggling to build analytical cards in a Fiori Overview Page. My source is an ABAP RAP Object providing the annotations via an OData v4 service. The symptom is that the card is displayed properly, with the frame of the chart (legend, axis look OK). However, the values and indeed the chart itself is not rendered. I checked the batch call, and the resulting content coming from the OData service is exactly as expected.

I am in BTP, running locally in BAS with the latest framework version, 1.127.5.

Chart annotation from view entity:

 

 

{
  qualifier: 'RequestsByStatusChart',
  chartType: #DONUT,
  description: 'Requests by Status',
  title: 'Requests by Status',
  dimensions: [ 'SummaryStatus' ],
  dimensionAttributes: [{ 
    dimension: 'SummaryStatus',
    role: #CATEGORY
  }],
  measures: [ 'RecordCount' ],
  measureAttributes: [{ 
    measure: 'RecordCount',
    role: #AXIS_1
  }]
}

 

 

Card definition in manifest.json:

 

 

            "RequestCountByStatus": {
                "template": "sap.ovp.cards.v4.charts.analytical",
                "model": "mainModel",
                "settings": {
                    "chartAnnotationPath": "com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.Chart#RequestsByStatusChart",
                    "entitySet": "Requests",
                    "title": "{{requestCountStatusTitle}}",
                    "subTitle": "{{requestCountStatusDesc}}",
                    "defaultSpan": {
                        "cols": 2,
                        "rows": 7
                    },
                    "identificationAnnotationPath": "com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.Identification#ManageRequests",
                    "presentationAnnotationPath": "com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.PresentationVariant#RequestsByStatusPres",
                    "dataPointAnnotationPath": "com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.DataPoint#RequestsByStatusDatapoint"
                }
            }

 

 

Response from OData service (the other annotation qualifers exist and are well :

 

 

{
    "@odata.context": "$metadata#Requests(SummaryStatus,SummaryStatusDesc,RecordCountAggregate)",
    "@odata.metadataEtag": "W/\"20241204174330\"",
    "value": [{
            "SummaryStatus": "COMPLETE",
            "SummaryStatusDesc": "Complete",
            "RecordCountAggregate": 2,
            "RecordCountAggregate@odata.type": "#Byte"
        }, {
            "SummaryStatus": "FAILED",
            "SummaryStatusDesc": "Failed",
            "RecordCountAggregate": 26,
            "RecordCountAggregate@odata.type": "#Byte"
        }, {
            "SummaryStatus": "IN_PROCESS",
            "SummaryStatusDesc": "In Process",
            "RecordCountAggregate": 110,
            "RecordCountAggregate@odata.type": "#Byte"
        }
    ]
}

 

 

The result:

As you can see, the datapoint is loading correctly, the legend is being rendered, but the graph itself is not there.

Any ideas what I'm missing?

entry.title: Extending Process Purchase Requisition(F1048A) app for Business need
entry.content:
Application Component : MM-FIO-PUR-REQ-SOC

 

Our Business requirement is to enable “Create Purchase order” button all the time for all PR’s in the list irrespective of the PR Type(Blocked, restrict). 

 

We have tried enabling the Create Purchase Order button by going for Adaptation project but this option is disabled.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Not able to make the New column to show in front screen of a app based on Analytical Query CDS view
entry.content:
Hi all,

I got a requirement to add a new column in the existing fiori report.  This report is published as ODATA service using a CDS view in backend . This CDS view is Analytical query CDS view. 

But new column "Open Amount" what i added is not showing in front of the report, i need to select this from settings and make it available in the report. I want this to show by default in the report. I have even tried @ui.lineitem.position annotation as well, also priority as #HIGH that didnt work. 

 

Also i want to add one more selection field in this app, for that i dont see any selection field annotation used in the CDS view but still i am able to see there are some input fields in this app. Not sure how to it is added. I thought since it is a analytical query it must have created using "Custom Analytical Queries" app but i could'nt find this query view ( Z_JOURNAL_Q010) there neither.

I also checked if there is any metadata extension view created for this but there nothing found in where used list of this analytical query. Only change it accepts is to add a new field but none of the annotations to position this or selection field works for this . 

 

Please let me know how to position the new column by default without selecting it from settings and also add a selection field for this report. 

 

Thanks in advance!!

Regards,

Kameeswaran

entry.title: Manage Manual Reservations - No direct postings possible to G/L account
entry.content:
Hello expert,

when I make a RESERVATION with the FIORI APP "Manage manual reservatio" F4839, the error message "No direct registration possible on the G/L account" appears and i can not save the document.
If I do same reservation via MB21, with the same Material/Plant/Co.Ge, I dont have any error and the document is saved.
Could you please help me to understand why? What kind of different checks sre done by the FIORI APP F4839?
Thanks a Lot.

Samuele.

entry.title: SAPUI5 cannot read properties of null (reading 'getText').
entry.content:
SAPUI5 gurus

I'm struggling with an error when I try to launch a Fiori app.

The first time that I visit the app, this runs in a good way. Since the second time, it shows an error:

This app is based on RT_PRNT_LABES1. As you can see, the problem is in ApplicationUtil.js (this is a standard file). I haven't manipulated that standard file.

Every time that I execute the app on SAP Web IDE, it runs correctly.

I tried to cleaned up the cache (frontend), cookies from my browser, but the issue still happening.

Do you have any suggestion?

Best regards.

Vicror Carmona.

entry.title: Need V4 Fiori Element Application Reference
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are working on new requirements for developing Fiori Element Application using V4 OData.

It has to be break-out type with extension on Actions.

Can someone suggest which Example we can take as a reference with the Git link.

Regards,

Rewati Raman

entry.title: Error when deploying Fiori app from VS code -Unexpected token '<', "<!DOCTYPE "... is not valid JSO
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to deploy SAP UI5 Fiori application from VS code to ABAP on-premise system. I installed all the extensions needed in VS code to create a Fiori application and was able to preview the application in the local host. When it comes to deployment to the backend system, I get the below error when running the command 'npm run deploy' and deployment fails.  

error abap-deploy-task ZDFGT Deployment has failed.
error abap-deploy-task ZDFGT Change logging level to debug your issue
error abap-deploy-task ZDFGT (see examples https://github.com/SAP/open-ux-tools/tree/main/packages/deploy-tooling#configuration-with-logging-enabled)
error builder:custom deploy-to-abap Unexpected token '<', "<!DOCTYPE "... is not valid JSON
Command deploy failed with error : Unexpected token '<', "<!DOCTYPE "... is not valid JSON

Any suggestions to resolve this error please?

Thank you for your help in advance!

entry.title: Passing parameters from an Ui5 application iframe to parent screen.
entry.content:
I developed a UI5 Fiori application and added that as a mashu up in the SAP Sales Cloud application.

How to pass parameters or values from mashup to standard screen without an API call... Meaning if I fill a field in that mashup, then from the mashup the value should pass to the standard field of the application.

Can anyone give insights on this?

 

SAP BTP, Kyma runtime

entry.title: Fiori List Report: Multi-value filter displayed as colour-coded checkboxes?
entry.content:
Hello fellow Fiori developers,

My List Report app has a filter bar with a multi-value field for status, with 3 possible values. By default it comes up as a multi-value dropdown box. I would like to have it rendered as 3 colour-coded checkboxes, like in this standard app:

 

Thanks for your valuable input!

entry.title: Unable to change URL in Target Mapping in Launchpad designer
entry.content: I can see URL in Target mapping , I need to change to another URL, but when I select the row and click on configure I am not able to see the URL so that I can edit. Is there any way achieve this. Attached both the screenshots.

entry.title: Adapt UI Different Approach between P and Q
entry.content:
So my questions are:

  1. How can I have app adaptions like in P, in Q and how do I assign business roles to it? 
    1. Note: I don't want to create multiple app variants?
  2. How can these adaptations then being transported to P?
  3. How can I delete old published Versions? Even if I switch back to and older version, when activating I need to create a new version (who comes up with this non sense stuff?) 

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: “search and select” option is missing from “City” search in app F2640 Display Customer List
entry.content:
After upgrading from SAP 2020 to 2023, in Fiori app F2640 (Display Customer List) the "search and select" option is not present in the City search. 

Any hero's out there?
